column1: Core Program - IVP Stage - Workflow Diagram

column3: Document No: CP-01-01-PM Rev 0
Mentor Eligbility:
1. Expertise: 10+ years experience, global exposure, relevant industries
2. Seniority: successful track record & prior mentorship
3. Network: can open doors for mentees
4. Entrepreneurial mindset
5. Availability: ≥3-4 hours/month; responsive
6. Passion and fit
Recruiting and Onboarding mentors:

1. Inbound: A person reaches out to the Community Growth & Outreach Officer to become a mentor, outbound: the Community G&O Officer reaches out to a potential mentor via email, LinkedIn, etc. Community G&O Officer continue the process based on the response.
NOTE (Rida): 2 draft emails - inbound and outbound to be shared with Zoho team
2. The Community Growth & Outreach Officer schedules a Zoom meeting (if needed) for the potential mentor to attend. The potential mentor attends the meeting.

4. The Community Growth & Outreach Officer sends a vetting form (to be shared with the Zoho team) to the potential mentors to complete. Once the form is submitted, the response is sent to Operations Support for vetting, and the Community Growth & Outreach Officer is notified. Zoho to send weekly reminders to fill the form.

5.Operations Support vets the potential mentor and updates the status in the system. The Community Growth & Outreach Officer is then notified. The status dropdown options should be: Clear or Not Clear.

6. After the vetting process, those who are not cleared will be disqualified and the process will end. For those who are cleared, the Community Growth & Outreach Officer will change the status field. The status fields will be defined later with the Zoho team.

7. Once the Community Growth & Outreach Officer changes the status, an automated email will be sent to the mentor including the handbook, TOR, and a form. All details will be shared with the Zoho team. Zoho to send weekly reminders twice to complete all the docs and communications coordinator to display mentors profile on website.

8. When the Mentors reply to the email and complete the required actions, their response will be recorded on Zoho. When the response is recorded, send an automated email to the communications coordinator to diplay the mentors on our website
Note: Zoho must be integrated with our website, and communications coordinator must be trained on it for future edits and modifications.

9. The Community Growth & Outreach Officer changes the status again to trigger an automated thank-you and onboarding email (explaining engagement types and journey phases). The email draft will be shared later with the Zoho team.
10. Zoho must remind the Community Growth & Outreach Officer one month before the completion of the mentor’s one-year term.
11. If the Community Growth & Outreach Officer wants to renew the mentor for another year, he changes the status again, and an automated renewal email will be sent.
